memory_text: Sunday mornings usually involve me sitting on the couch with the live F1 timing data pulled up on my laptop screen, cross-referencing sector times while the actual race broadcast plays on the TV.
proactive_hook: Do you actively track the analytics of your favorite sports, or do you prefer to just watch the broadcast?

memory_text: There is a half-eaten box of local Indian-style vegetarian pizza sitting on my kitchen counter. Finding places near me that do heavy, spicy vegetarian toppings perfectly has become my weekend mission.
proactive_hook: What is the most underrated pizza topping combination in your opinion?
